title: digitaria sanguinalis subsp. vulgaris
intro: Digitaria sanguinalis subsp. vulgaris, also known as common cranesbill or crimson cranesbill, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits associated with Digitaria sanguinalis subsp. vulgaris include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and calm irritated skin and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, making it a versatile natural remedy for various ailments.
